name: SEMAFO Inc.
description: SEMAFO Inc. was a Canadian-based intermediate gold producer that focused on the exploration, development, and operation of gold mines primarily in West Africa. With over twenty years of experience, the company operated key assets such as the Mana Mine and the Boungou Mine in Burkina Faso. SEMAFO specialized in open-pit mining operations and maintained a significant presence in the region until 2020, when it was acquired by Endeavour Mining Corporation. The company's name is an acronym for the Mining Exploration Society in West Africa, reflecting its core operational focus.
